description: Beanstream is a payment processing platform. Its public developer-facing interface found here is a REST API for payment transactions and related payment operations.
summary: Beanstream exposes one documented REST API surface: the Beanstream Payments API at `https://www.beanstream.com/api/v1`, with a public OpenAPI spec mirrored by APIs.guru; no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.
